recommendations.justification: Executable evidence shows hf is the installed CLI entrypoint in huggingface_hub 1.8.0 for this environment.

recommendations.change: Install the source snapshot into the env seed with `--no-build-isolation --no-deps`.
recommendations.justification: The env seed already contains setuptools and runtime dependencies, so disabling build isolation removes the bundle-only replay blocker without changing the runtime family.
